identity.mission: Transform VenuLoQ into a ₹50,000 crore premium platform using high-density, luxurious, and cohesive design.
principles: Density is Luxury: Show more, but make it breathe with micro-spacing.
Golden Touch: Use the brand gold (#D4B36A) for intent and value, never for decoration.
Typography as Hierarchy: Serif for emotion (Names), Mono for value (Price), Sans for context (Details).
Tactile Surfaces: Glassmorphism for floating controls, crisp cards for content.

heading.usage: Venue Names, Section Titles, 'Top Pick' Badge text

mono.usage: Prices, Capacity Numbers, Ratings, Data points

rules: Headings must be 'tracking-tight' for a premium editorial look.
Mono font must be small (text-xs or text-sm) but high contrast.
Body text should use 'text-muted-foreground' for secondary info to maintain hierarchy.

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-black/5

card.density: Show 5-6 items on typical viewport (requires compact vertical rhythm)

Header.structure: Flex row: Logo (Icon) + Search Bar (Expanded) + User Profile
Header.search_bar: Rounded-full bg-[#F4F1EC] border-none shadow-inner text-sm pl-10 h-10 w-full font-sans

FilterBar.item_style: rounded-full border border-black/10 bg-white px-4 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium text-black/80 whitespace-nowrap active:bg-black active:text-white transition-colors

VenueCard.structure: Flex Container (bg-white rounded-xl overflow-hidden border border-black/5 shadow-sm relative)

elements.name: ImageGallery
elements.style: w-[120px] h-[120px] m-1.5 rounded-lg object-cover bg-gray-100 flex-shrink-0 relative overflow-hidden

elements.name: Content
elements.style: flex flex-col flex-1 py-2.5 pr-3 pl-1 justify-between h-[130px]

elements.name: TopPickBadge
elements.style: absolute top-3 left-3 bg-[#D4B36A] text-[#0B0B0D] text-[9px] font-bold px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded shadow-sm uppercase tracking-wider z-10

elements.name: HeartIcon
elements.style: absolute top-3 right-3 text-black/40 hover:text-red-500 transition-colors w-4 h-4

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. UPDATE tailwind.config.js: Add 'Cormorant Garamond', 'DM Sans', 'JetBrains Mono' to fontFamily.
2. SETUP Theme: Ensure background is #F4F1EC and text defaults to #0B0B0D.
3. IMPLEMENT SearchPage: Create a new page layout with sticky header and scrollable list.
4. CREATE VenueCard: Build the horizontal card component exactly as described in 'VenueCard' section. Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all numbers (prices, ratings, capacity).
5. MOCK DATA: Use the provided venue_images to create a list of 6 mock venues.
6. ADD 'TOP PICK' LOGIC: The first two items in the list must have the 'TOP PICK' badge.
7. ENSURE DENSITY: The card height MUST be fixed (approx 130px-140px) so 5+ items fit on a mobile screen.
8. MICRO-INTERACTIONS: Add active states to filters (turn black on click) and heart icon (turn red).
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: Do not use gradients for backgrounds, use solid #F4F1EC or white.
Use glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-md) only for the sticky header.
Use Lucide React icons with stroke-width={1.5} for elegance.
